---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the H747 Elite robot
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Feature
A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Use Case
Describe the specific use case or scenario where this feature would be valuable. Include any relevant details about how you would use this feature in operation.

### Example Scenario
- **Environment**: <!-- e.g., large open area, carpeted room, multi-level home -->
- **Task**: <!-- e.g., scheduled cleaning, spot cleaning, edge cleaning -->
- **Current Workaround**: <!-- how are you handling this today? -->

## Priority
Select the priority level:

- [ ] **Critical** — Blocking operation, needs immediate attention
- [ ] **High** — Important feature for upcoming milestone
- [x] **Medium** — Nice to have, would improve user experience
- [ ] **Low** — Future enhancement, not urgent

## Affected Modules
Select all modules that would be affected by this feature:

- [ ] M7 Motor Control (FOC / speed / position)
- [ ] M4 Safety Monitor (BMS / watchdog / fault detection)
- [ ] RK3566 Navigation (SLAM / path planning)
- [ ] RK3566 Networking (WiFi / MQTT / OTA)
- [ ] Sensor Subsystem (lidar / ToF / IMU / camera)
- [ ] Power Management (charging / BMS / ship mode)
- [ ] Factory Test / Calibration
- [ ] CI/CD / Build System
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: <!-- please specify -->

## Proposed Solution
If you have a proposed implementation approach, describe it here:

```c
// Example code or pseudocode (if applicable)
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why they were not chosen.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing feature requests before filing this one
- [ ] I have described a clear use case
- [ ] I have selected a priority level
- [ ] I have identified affected modules
